final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Korean café lifestyle photo with annotated hand-drawn notes, styled for Instagram Stories.

Style/medium: smartphone editorial photography with digital hand-drawn sketch overlay, Korean café aesthetic, flat-lay and 45-degree angle shots, soft matte filter
Composition: top-down flat lay and eye-level 45° angle, smartphone lens perspective, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh
Subject: iced latte in clear glass with visible layers, croffle or Korean-style dessert on ceramic plate, minimalist tableware
Scene/backdrop: Korean café interior with warm wood tones, soft natural light from window, clean minimal background with negative space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, gentle shadows, cozy and relaxed atmosphere
Color palette: warm cream and beige base, soft brown coffee tones, muted pastel accents, white negative space
Materials/textures: frosted glass, ceramic glaze, flaky pastry texture, smooth wooden table surface
Text (verbatim): "【描写规则】・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导【文本规则】・日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）・简短，像自言自语一样的评论・语气是"日记・一言・情感寄托"【评论生成规则】・饮料 → 味道・温度・心情（例：清爽、温柔的甜味）・食物 → 口感・美味（例：湿润、最高）・空间 → 氛围（例：放松、美好时光）・整体 → 一言总结（例：幸福过头了～）【装饰】・蒸汽、闪闪发光、心形、小表情符号等适度添加・不过度，留出"空白"【完成风格】・Instagram故事风、杂志的粗糙笔记风・时尚且轻松的氛围"
Constraints: must include hand-drawn annotation overlay with thin white sketch lines, rough single-stroke style, Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance, minimal decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons) with intentional negative space
Avoid: photorealistic AI perfection, overly clean digital lines, cluttered composition, 8K stuffer aesthetic, watermark, text in wrong language
